# Altscan

> Altscan is an open-source, multi-chain block explorer platform. One engine —
> one indexer, one schema — powers independent explorers across chains.
> BNBScan (BNB Chain) and EthScan (Ethereum) are live today. AGPL-3.0.

## Products

- [BNBScan](https://bnbscan.com): BNB Chain explorer — blocks, transactions,
  tokens, DEX trades, gas, whales, free REST API. Agent map: https://bnbscan.com/llms.txt
- [EthScan](https://ethscan.io): Ethereum explorer, same engine and features.
  Agent map: https://ethscan.io/llms.txt
- [Status page](https://status.altscan.io): live health of both explorers

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/heathermhuang/altscan): the full platform —
  Next.js explorer frontend, BullMQ indexer, Postgres schema, Astro site.
  TypeScript throughout. License: AGPL-3.0 — read, fork, self-host.

## Data

- [Live chain status JSON](https://altscan.io/api/chains.json): current health,
  latest block, and response time for every explorer (60s cache)

## Usage policy

- AI retrieval and citation: allowed (Content-Signal: ai-input=yes)
- AI training on site content: not permitted (ai-train=no)

## Facts

- Maintained by Measurable Data Token (MDT). Independent — not affiliated with
  BscScan, Etherscan, Binance, or the Ethereum Foundation.
- Adding a chain is one config entry; the platform is designed to extend.
